description: Expected LayoutResult for example_03_text_plus_visual.py. Text-plus-visual framing: LEFT column is top-anchored at (-3.5, +3.0) and grows downward; RIGHT visual centred at (+3.5, 0) within a 5×4 bounding box. Two semantic groups (text_column, visual_column) plus a decorative separator.
notes: text.line_3 uses font_size 48 because it's the payoff (the integral); earlier lines use 36 per §5.3 defaults.
Three shapes on RIGHT share position (+3.5, 0) — they form a stack: axes underneath, graph on top, rectangles/filled alternate via Transform. z_order disambiguates rendering.
rest_frame_salient_count counts axes+graph as one (they're grouped), not two.
